title: Gospel articulated as we have to get my son back, enlisting enemies to save his son
body:
Double entender multiple applications 
- got enlists/sends the word, the mimra, to go from heaven to get his son. He enlists/sends the gentiles to go get his son : his son is Israel 
- God enlists/sends the word, the mimra, to go from heaven to get his son. He enlists/sends Israel to get his son: his son is Adam, the gentiles.

Got attacked and ruined the enmity of Genesis 3 
With his gospel god attacked the enmity between the seed of the serpent and the seed of Eve

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: God  sent the gentiles to his son, his Son is israel,God sent word to leave Heaven to get his son and he sends Israel to get his son who is Adam who is the gentiles. God attacked and ruined the severe hatred of Genesis 3 with his gospel.
